traits.name: Flyby
traits.description: The hippogriff doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The hippogriff makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

tactical_info.environment: Mountain peaks, open grasslands, areas where horses and eagles coexist
tactical_info.tactics: Uses flyby to avoid opportunity attacks, makes diving attacks, keen perception for spotting threats
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low hit points for Large size, animal intelligence limits complex tactics
